faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Malverne home?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moth infestation include small holes in wool, silk, or cashmere garments, webbing in closet corners, silken tubes in fabric folds, and small beige or gold-colored moths flying near wardrobes. You may also notice larvae (small white caterpillars) on clothing or furniture. Our Malverne technicians provide free inspections to confirm infestations and assess damage.

faqs.question: What determines the cost of clothes moth control in Malverne?
faqs.answer: Pricing ranges from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of infestation, size of your home, number of affected rooms, and treatment method required. Smaller infestations in single closets cost less, while whole-home treatments with heat or fumigation for severe cases cost more. We provide free estimates and customize solutions to fit your budget and needs.

faqs.question: Are clothes moth treatments safe for my family and pets in Malverne?
faqs.answer: Yes, we prioritize safety in all our Malverne treatments. We use EPA-approved products and methods including pheromone traps, targeted sprays, and heat treatments that are safe when applied by our certified technicians. We provide clear instructions for any necessary preparations and re-entry times to ensure your family and pets remain protected throughout the process.

faqs.question: How can I prevent clothes moths from returning after treatment?
faqs.answer: Prevention includes regular vacuuming of closets and storage areas, storing seasonal clothing in sealed containers, dry cleaning garments before storage, using cedar blocks or lavender sachets, and maintaining proper ventilation. Our Malverne team provides detailed prevention guidance and offers follow-up monitoring services to ensure your home remains moth-free long-term.
